title: Update loading screen agent with UX intent

log.context: Update loading screen agent with UX intent

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**File modified:** `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/index.ts`

The `d_start` handler now sends two `d_mob_progress` messages instead of one:
1. Immediately: `status='loading'`, `completed=0`, `currentEntity="Preparing mobs..."` — this triggers the overlay to appear with an empty progress bar
2. After 600ms: `status='complete'`, `completed=N/N` — bar fills to 100%
3. After 800ms: `initFloor` fires — floor data arrives and scene transitions to dungeon
